response.justification: The candidate lacks demonstrated professional C++ experience on Windows in capital markets or fixed-income domains, with most C++ work being academic or non-financial (e.g., thesis, LabWindows), and primary expertise centered on JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and web/mobile stacks — failing to meet the mandatory 5–10 years of C++ in financial systems context.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility with modern web and DevOps tools
Active open-source contributor with technical depth in DLang and testing frameworks
Excellent communication skills demonstrated through workshops and public talks
concerns: No evidence of professional C++ development on Windows in financial systems
Lacks direct fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience
SQL experience listed but not contextualized in high-volume financial data systems
